title: munnozia tenera
intro: Munnozia tenera, also known as the delicate Munnozia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Munnozia tenera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine.
